titleStmt.title: Miracle of Gabriel: On the apparition of St Gabriel to a king in the country of Neqlon, who refused to build a church
ወሀሎ፡ ፩፡ ሀገር፡ ዘይሰመይ፡ ኔቅሎን፡ ወበውእቱ፡ ሀገር፡ ፈቀዱ፡ ሐኒጸ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡
Wa-hallo 1 hagar za-yǝssammay Neqlon wa-ba-wǝʾǝtu hagar faqadu ḥaniṣa beta krǝstiyān
Once upon a time, there was a country named Neqlon, in which some wanted to build a church

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

abstract.p: Miracle of about the building of a church dedicated to St Gabriel in the country Neqlon with mentioning of a blind person, who asked about the completion of the work while the construction began. This miracle is very similar to and thematically similar to . It cannot be ruled out that there is a connection to and , or that they are in fact one and the same text. It forms part of the monthly reading for the 19th of Gǝnbot in the , while it is attested for the monthly reading for the 19th of Miyāzyā in other witnesses of the .

revisionDesc.change: Updated listRelation, abstract, titles and edition

relation.name: ecrm:CLP46i_may_form_part_of
relation.desc: The text may be part of the monthly reading for 19 Miyāzyā.

relation.name: ecrm:CLP46i_may_form_part_of
relation.desc: The text may be part of the monthly reading for 19 Gǝnbot .

div.note: The following incipit is taken from 166.
div.ab: ተአምሪሁ፡ ለቅዱስ፡ ገብርኤል፡ ሊቀ፡ መላእክት፡ ትንብልናሁ፡ ይዕቀበነ፡ ለኵልነ፡ ውሉደ፡ ጥምቀት፡ ወሀሎ፡ ፩፡ ሀገር፡ ዘይሰመይ፡ ኔቅሎን፡ ወበውእቱ፡ ሀገር፡ ፈቀዱ፡ ሐኒፀ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ በስሙ፡ ለሊቀ፡ መላእክት፡ ገብርኤል፡ እስመ፡ ሊቀ፡ መላእክት፡ ገብርኤል፡ አንሶሰወ፡ ቅድሜሆሙ፡ ወወሰነ፡ ሎሙ፡ መካነ። ወሶበ፡ ኮነ፡ መጠነ፡ አሐቲ፡ ወርኅ፡ እንዘ፡ ሀሎ፡ ኀቤሆሙ፡ ተሰዓላ፡ አውር፡ ለንግሥት፡ ከመ፡ ትፈጽም፡ ጻሕቆ፡ ዘኃሠሠ፡ በእንተ፡ ሕንፃ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ እንዘ፡ ይብል፡ እፈቱ፡ ከመ፡ ትስዓሊ፡ ሊተ፡ ኀበ፡ ንጉሥ፡ ከመ፡ ያብሐኒ፡ እሑር፡ ኀበ፡ ብሔርየ ፡ ኣሕንፅ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያኑ፡ ለሊቀ፡ መላእክት፡ ገብርኤል፡ ንጉሥኒ፡ ኢያበውሖ፡ ይሑር፡ ብሔር፡ ወሀሎ፡ አውር፡ ይቴክዝ፡ ጥቀ።
